title: Procurement Executive
description:
We are seeking a detail-oriented, thorough, and organized procurement executive to oversee purchases and develop new contracts. In this position, you will play a key role in procuring high-quality and cost-efficient supplies for our organization.

Job Description

  • Manage day-to-day procurement operations, including purchasing, new product sourcing, and supplier quality management.
  • Source and evaluate suppliers by inviting quotations and assessing price, quality, range, service support, availability, compliance, production and distribution capabilities, and supplier track record.
  • Prepare purchase requisitions and obtain necessary approvals in accordance with company policies.
  • Build, maintain, and regularly review a reliable and cost-effective supplier base to support business and operational needs.
  • Analyse historical and projected inventory demand, monitor usage trends, and forecast requirements to minimise wastage and excess stock.
  • Ensure timely sourcing of cost-effective products and services with consistent quality standards.
  • Prepare, issue, and follow up on purchase orders; monitor deliveries and expedite where required.
  • Review monthly purchase orders and consumption reports.
  • Reconcile discrepancies in purchases, purchase orders, and supplier invoices to support month-end closing and timely payments.
  • Work closely with the Central Kitchen and Operations teams on R&D and product improvements.
  • Liaise with internal stakeholders and suppliers to resolve issues related to defective or non-compliant goods and services.
  • Perform ad-hoc administrative duties as assigned.

Requirements

  • Solid knowledge and understanding of procurement processes, policy, and systems
  • Minimum 2 years’ experience as a procurement executive or related position
  • Proficient computer skills, including Microsoft Office Suite (Word, PowerPoint, Outlook, and Excel)
  • Ability to analyze problems and strategize for better solutions
  • Ability to negotiate, establish, and administer contracts
  • Excellent verbal and written communication skills
  • Ability to multitask, prioritize, and manage time efficiently
  • Accurate and precise attention to detail
  • Ability to work well with management and staff at all levels
  • Goal-oriented, organized team player

postedCompany.description:
Authentic modern casual Vietnamese restaurant in Singapore: MRSPHO.COM


Mrs Pho is a tribute to all the Vietnamese mothers, grandmothers and aunties we affectionately crown the best cook in the family and in the neighbourhood. Eating at Mrs Pho is more than just a meal, it is a lesson in ‘Pholosophy’, a genuine slice of Vietnamese culture from plate to fit out. 


The outlets have quirky vibes true to Vietnam’s booming street art scenes and typical Vietnamese household with lanterns and bamboo beads. We built our restaurant to be a place where we feed you like family.

OUTLET 1: BUSSORAH STREET
